# CLI reference

<!-- Generated by tools/render_cli_reference.py. Do not edit manually. -->

This file is generated from `ima_note_cli.cli.build_parser()` and is the complete argument reference.

`note_id`/`--note-id` is canonical. `doc_id`/`--doc-id` appears only as deprecated compatibility where the parser exposes it.

## `ima`

```text
usage: ima [-h] {auth,note,kb} ...

Manage IMA notes and knowledge bases from the command line.

positional arguments:
  {auth,note,kb}
    auth          Check whether IMA credentials are configured.
    note          Manage IMA notes.
    kb            Manage IMA knowledge bases.

options:
  -h, --help      show this help message and exit
```

### `ima auth`

```text
usage: ima auth [-h] [--json]

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
  --json      Print structured JSON.
```

### `ima kb`

```text
usage: ima kb [-h]
              {search-base,show-base,browse,search,addable,add-note,add-url,add-file,media-info,read,export}
              ...

positional arguments:
  {search-base,show-base,browse,search,addable,add-note,add-url,add-file,media-info,read,export}
    search-base         Search knowledge bases.
    show-base           Show a knowledge base.
    browse              Browse knowledge.
    search              Search knowledge.
    addable             List addable knowledge bases.
    add-note            Add an IMA note.
    add-url             Import web pages or supported remote files.
    add-file            Upload supported local files.
    media-info          Inspect original media.
    read                Read original media.
    export              Export original media.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
```

#### `ima kb add-file`

```text
usage: ima kb add-file [-h] --kb-id KB_ID --file FILES [--folder-id FOLDER_ID]
                       [--content-type CONTENT_TYPE]
                       [--on-conflict {error,rename}]
                       [--upload-timeout UPLOAD_TIMEOUT] [--json]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --kb-id KB_ID
  --file FILES
  --folder-id FOLDER_ID
  --content-type CONTENT_TYPE
  --on-conflict {error,rename}
  --upload-timeout UPLOAD_TIMEOUT
  --json
```

#### `ima kb add-note`

```text
usage: ima kb add-note [-h] --kb-id KB_ID
                       (--note-id NOTE_ID | --doc-id DEPRECATED_DOC_ID)
                       [--title TITLE] [--folder-id FOLDER_ID] [--json]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --kb-id KB_ID
  --note-id NOTE_ID
  --doc-id DEPRECATED_DOC_ID
  --title TITLE
  --folder-id FOLDER_ID
  --json
```

#### `ima kb add-url`

```text
usage: ima kb add-url [-h] --kb-id KB_ID --url URLS [--folder-id FOLDER_ID]
                      [--on-conflict {error,rename}]
                      [--download-timeout DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT]
                      [--upload-timeout UPLOAD_TIMEOUT] [--json]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --kb-id KB_ID
  --url URLS
  --folder-id FOLDER_ID
  --on-conflict {error,rename}
  --download-timeout DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT
  --upload-timeout UPLOAD_TIMEOUT
  --json
```

### `ima note`

```text
usage: ima note [-h] {search,folders,list,get,create,append} ...

positional arguments:
  {search,folders,list,get,create,append}
    search              Search notes by title or content.
    folders             List note folders.
    list                List notes within a folder or the root notes view.
    get                 Read a note's plain-text content.
    create              Create a new note from Markdown content.
    append              Append Markdown content to an existing note.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
```

#### `ima note append`

```text
usage: ima note append [-h] (--content CONTENT | --file FILE) [--json] note_id

positional arguments:
  note_id

options:
  -h, --help         show this help message and exit
  --content CONTENT
  --file FILE
  --json
```

#### `ima note create`

```text
usage: ima note create [-h] [--title TITLE] [--folder-id FOLDER_ID]
                       (--content CONTENT | --file FILE) [--json]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --title TITLE
  --folder-id FOLDER_ID
  --content CONTENT
  --file FILE
  --json
```

#### `ima note folders`

```text
usage: ima note folders [-h] [--cursor CURSOR] [--limit LIMIT] [--all]
                        [--max-pages MAX_PAGES] [--json]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --cursor CURSOR
  --limit LIMIT
  --all                 Collect all pages.
  --max-pages MAX_PAGES
                        Maximum pages when using --all.
  --json
```

#### `ima note get`

```text
usage: ima note get [-h] [--json] note_id

positional arguments:
  note_id

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
  --json
```

#### `ima note list`

```text
usage: ima note list [-h] [--folder-id FOLDER_ID] [--cursor CURSOR]
                     [--sort {updated,created,title,size}] [--limit LIMIT]
                     [--all] [--max-pages MAX_PAGES] [--json]

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --folder-id FOLDER_ID
  --cursor CURSOR
  --sort {updated,created,title,size}
  --limit LIMIT
  --all                 Collect all pages.
  --max-pages MAX_PAGES
                        Maximum pages when using --all.
  --json
```

#### `ima note search`

```text
usage: ima note search [-h] [--search-type {title,content}]
                       [--sort {updated,created,title,size}] [--start START]
                       [--limit LIMIT] [--all] [--max-pages MAX_PAGES]
                       [--json]
                       query

positional arguments:
  query

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --search-type {title,content}
  --sort {updated,created,title,size}
  --start START
  --limit LIMIT
  --all                 Collect all pages.
  --max-pages MAX_PAGES
                        Maximum pages when using --all.
  --json
```
